---
title: "The Four Tenets — Bob, Bib, B(l)ab, Boobs"
date: "2026-05-21"
description: "A standalone explainer of the four Bobology tenets — nucleus, nourishment, connection (with the parenthetical L), and pleasure — plus the scaffolding that holds them together."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobbology, framework]
path: /bob-bib-blab-boob.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/bob-bib-blab-boob.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/bob-bib-blab-boob.html");</script>
```
